info.name: Task Application API (Detailed View)
info.description:
Comprehensive Postman API Collection mapping the Full-Stack Task Assignment structures natively built under Express.js and MongoDB.

Key Mechanisms:
- Auth Tokens (`Bearer Token` system required for Task endpoints)
- Payload Validation (Strict parameters checking Zod boundaries natively)
- Data Sanitization (Removes __v and mapping _id directly out to explicit 'id' variable definitions)

item.name: Authentication & Context
item.description: Entry points for validating permissions and onboarding explicit identities into the Database System.

request.description: Registers standard identities under explicit roles (`admin` or `user`). A `token` response containing the signed symmetric key payload is returned natively upon success.
Validates Bcrypt hashed configurations stored in the Database cluster and regenerates symmetric `token` authentication mechanisms bound across consecutive calls.

item.name: Task Object Architecture
item.description: Secured endpoints validating against `Bearer Token` headers implicitly carrying identity information across all transaction layers.

request.description:
Depending directly on the JSON Web Token roles contained within the Authorization header:
- `user` payload decodes mapping exclusively arrays instantiated natively by this specific origin requestor.
- `admin` explicitly bypasses document constraint filtering, populating completely untampered lists comprising every tracked task nested underneath Database Clusters.
Binds mapping natively bridging `userId` implicitly decoded out from Authorization headers with Title parameters.
Overwrites partial configuration elements mapped out across specified ObjectIDs. Validates collision prevention exclusively barring unapproved User manipulation if identity mismatches.
Permanent purge mapping matching database entity instances out natively from Document storage parameters.
